message:
feat(cass): add cass-export feature for exporting recorder sessions to cass connectors

Add CassExportQuery, CassExportSession, and export_sessions_for_cass()
behind the cass-export feature flag. Exports recorder session data
(segments, metadata, timestamps) in a cass-compatible format for
cross-agent session search integration.

Add cass_integration.rs tests covering: export with pane_id filter,
since/until time range, after_id pagination, empty result handling,
and limit enforcement. Add feature dependency in Cargo.toml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -470,6 +470,7 @@ default = [
     "agent-mail",
     "asupersync-runtime",
     "browser",
+    "cass-export",
     "disk-pressure",
     "distributed",
     "frankensearch",
@@ -538,6 +539,8 @@ __journal_types_placeholder = []
 subprocess-bridge = []
 # Feature gate for mcp_agent_mail_rust coordination bridge.
 agent-mail = ["subprocess-bridge"]
+# Feature gate for FrankenTerm session/content export consumed by cass connectors.
+cass-export = []
 # Feature gate for vibe_cockpit telemetry export bridge.
 vc-export = ["subprocess-bridge"]
